---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for codingverse
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that codingverse doesn't support well today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. If it maps to a mode (pack / search / observe) or a
specific command, mention which.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else — examples, references, or related tools.
